description: Convert legacy 2D CAD contours from 'C:\workspace\data\legacy_contours.dxf' into a 3D terrain model. The source file contains flat contour polylines and text labels representing their intended elevations. Assign the elevations to the polylines based on the labels and generate a triangulated terrain model. Save the project to 'C:\workspace\data\reconstructed_terrain.tcp' and export the elevated points as a plain text file (X, Y, Z) to 'C:\workspace\data\3d_elevated_points.xyz'.
